items.caption: A person wearing a brown t-shirt with the text "geocaching - not all who wander are lost" printed in white on the front. the t-shirt is a slim fit style and the person is standing against a plain background. the text on the t-shirt is a slogan related to the outdoor activity of geocaching, which involves finding and hiding containers called "geocaches" using gps coordinates. the phrase "not all who wander are lost" is a play on words, referencing the famous line from the poem "the road not taken" by robert frost, and is often used to describe the adventurous nature of geocachers.
